common.pastSettlement: {count, plural, one {# past settlement} other {# past settlements}}

landing.heroTitle: Never wonder who owes whom again.
landing.heroSubtitle: Split expenses with friends. Multi-currency. Free forever.
landing.recentGroupsSubtitle: Pick up where you left off.

splitting.title: Flexible splitting
splitting.desc: Split by fixed amount or percentage — per person, your way.

currency.title: Multi-currency
currency.desc: Add expenses in any currency, settled in the group's base currency.

settlement.title: Smart settlement
settlement.desc: Minimizes the number of payments needed to clear all debts.

groups.title: Groups
groups.subtitle: Recently opened on this device
groups.noGroupsDescription: Create a group or paste a group link above to get started.

groupForm.createDescription: Start a group and add people by name
groupForm.passwordHint: Leave it blank to keep the group open.

joinGroup.error: Paste a group link or ID

qrScanner.scanHint: Point your camera at a SplitWeiss QR code
qrScanner.cameraError: Could not access camera. Check permissions.

identity.pickName: Pick your name so we can highlight your balances.

unlock.lockedDescription: This group is locked on new devices.

expenses.noExpensesDescription: Add the first expense to start splitting.
expenses.noMatchingDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters.
expenses.foreignCurrencyWarning: Different currency than the group — make sure the date is accurate, as exchange rates are based on it.

balances.noExpensesDescription: Add expenses to see balances and spending.
balances.staleRatesWarning: Exchange rates could not be fetched for some dates. Values may be approximate.

settlements.noSettlementsDescription: Once debts are calculated, suggested settlements will appear here.
settlements.needAtLeast2Description: Add another member before this group can show who should pay whom.
settlements.staleRatesWarning: Exchange rates could not be fetched for some dates. Values may be approximate.

settings.shareGroupDescription: Invite others by sharing the link or scanning the QR code.
settings.passwordProtectedShare: This group is password-protected. Share the password separately.
settings.shareNativeLocked:
Join "{name}" on SplitWeiss!

🔒 This group is password-protected — ask the group creator for the password.
settings.groupDetailsDescription: Anyone in the group can edit these.
settings.baseCurrencyHint: Used for balance calculations. Existing expenses keep their original currency.
settings.passwordProtectionDescription: Ask for a password on new devices.
settings.changePasswordHint: Changing it clears saved access on other devices.
settings.addPasswordHint: Anyone with the password can open this group.
settings.membersDescription: Anyone in the group can add or remove people.
settings.yourIdentityDescription: Change who you are on this device.
settings.identityReset: Identity reset — pick who you are.

error.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred loading this page.

notFound.title: Group not found
notFound.description: This group may have been deleted, or the link may be incorrect.

install.title: Install SplitWeiss
install.subtitle: Get the full app experience — add to your home screen:
install.iosSafariStep1: Tap {ellipsis} in the toolbar, then {share} Share
install.iosSafariStep2: Tap View More, then + Add to Home Screen
install.iosChromeStep1: Tap the {share} Share button in Chrome
install.androidStep2: Tap Add to Home screen or Install app
